privileged_info_summary: The task is a construction bid proposal document creation task using Apache OpenOffice Writer. Data is synthetic, generated inline in setup_task.sh. The task creates a project_data.json file containing construction project details including contractor info (Ironclad Builders, LLC), client name (Lone Star Credit Union), cost estimate (total $1,009,000), and project schedule. The verifier checks for document structure (minimum 6 Heading 1 styles and 8 Heading 2 styles), navigation elements (Table of Contents and page numbers), tables (minimum 3), and content accuracy. Two metadata claims are inaccurate: expected_bid_amount should include the dollar sign ($1,009,000 not 1,009,000), and company_name is incomplete (should be 'Ironclad Builders, LLC' not just 'Ironclad Builders').
